meaning: adj.能被激动的,易兴奋的,易激动的,过敏的
examples: Mary sat beside Elaine, who today seemed excitable.
Whole families had been brought into the waiting room, and the place was packed with excitable children, exhausted parents, even a flight attendant.
The most excitable bears are not so much polar as bipolar.
Excitable bouts of windbreaking will not endear you to a girl, just to pick one example.
Excitable fans may have to wait until Nintendo Spaceworld to get their hype-fix.
